title: The Biosphere: the World of Living Things
headnote: * Division I of Part Three deals with the nature, origin, evolution, distinctive properties, and classification of living things. Divisions II, III, and IV deal with life at the molecular, cellular, organismal, and behavioral levels.
The outlines in the five sections of Division V deal with the world of living things taken as a single system of biotic and environmental interactions and interdependencies.
